---
title: "01_data_prep"
author: "Francis Barnabe Kengne"
date: "2026-03-21"
output: html_document
---

Nota: This is a one time run file, during data peparation.

```{r}
#install.packages(c("usethis", "devtools", "roxygen2"))
library(usethis)
library(devtools)

# use_description(fields = list(
#  Title = "Social Contact Matrices for Sub-Saharan Africa",
#  Description = "Provides access to empirical social contact matrices from a systematic review in Sub-Saharan Africa, with tools to list, filter, # and retrieve matrices for infectious disease modeling.",
#  `Authors@R` = 'c(
#    person("Francis Barnabe", "Kengne", email = "fbkengne@gmail.com", role = c("aut", "cre")),
#    person("Faharudeen", "Alhassan", role = "aut"),
#    person("Kin On", "Kwok", role = "aut"),
#    person("Jing", "Kersey", role = "aut"),
#    person("Geraldo", "Chowell", role = "aut"),
#    person("Frank", "Baiden", role = "aut"),
#    person("Joyce", "Komesuor", role = "aut"),
#    person("Isaac Chun Hai", "Fung", role = "aut")
#  )',
#  License = "MIT + file LICENSE"
# ))

#use_mit_license("Francis Barnabe Kengne")
#use_package("ggplot2")
#use_package("dplyr")
#use_package("purrr")
#use_package("reshape2")
#use_package("stringr")
#use_package("tidyr")
#use_package("readxl")
#use_package("patchwork")
```
